title: Functions, Parameters, this, and Callable Contracts · Runtime Trace: Higher Order Functions
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable transformations, callbacks, methods, and boundary adapters. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js higher order functions increment in a function-oriented routing toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design callbacks and higher-order functions with explicit timing, error, and return-value contracts.
Predict this from call form and use bind, call, apply, or lexical capture only when the ownership model requires it.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
